mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, mission_date AS missionDate, slot, mission_code AS missionCode, title, target_count AS targetCount, progress, reward_granted AS rewardGranted FROM user_daily_mission WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND mission_date = #{missionDate} ORDER BY slot
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_daily_mission WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND mission_date = #{missionDate}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_daily_mission (user_id, mission_date, slot, mission_code, title, target_count, progress, reward_granted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{missionDate}, #{slot}, #{missionCode}, #{title}, #{targetCount}, #{progress}, #{rewardGranted})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_daily_mission SET progress = #{progress} WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND mission_date = #{missionDate} AND slot = #{slot}
UPDATE user_daily_mission SET reward_granted = TRUE WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND mission_date = #{missionDate} AND slot = #{slot}
